problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
mechanism: Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling
hypothesis: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Mycorrhizal. Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
